New folder

onomatopoeic - Google Search
Given the following computation related terms, more specifically to the nomenclature used by the Microsoft Windows operating system regarding the management of filesystems and memory: ````terms - file - file properties - filename - filename extension - filetype - file location - filesize - file attributes - file advanced attributes - file default application/program to open with - file version history - file details - file permissions - file permissions security entity inheritance - file grouping and classification options - file classifications - file modification date - file creation date - file access date - file libraries ```` Hence, sift thoroughly the ontology, semiotics, etc., of such computational systems and entities in order to discern properly in, of, and in what does the above given terms convey, convene, consist and, at last, the contrasts and interests between each other/one another. - Google Search
